BDRY
Dry Bulk Shipping
June 20, 2023
Breakwave Dry Futures Index: 1,400 Baltic Dry Index (spot): 1,076 Short-term Indicators:
↓ 30D: -9.0% ↓ 30D: -27.1% Momentum: Positive
↑ YTD: 36.3% ↓ YTD: -29.0% Sentiment: Neutral
↓ YOY: -51.8% ↓ YOY: -56.3% Fundamentals: Neutral
Bi-Weekly Report
• Futures curve continues to adjust to an uninspiring macro outlook - With the summer months upon us, dry bulk
markets are faced with softening economic activity out of China, which remains the main demand driver for the
sector. So far China has failed to excite, and although the year-over-year comps look impressive, one should always
keep in mind the considerable base effects on such comparisons. On more normalized levels, iron ore imports into
